title: itemId vs pulseId
excerpt:
Hi, 
What is the difference between itemId and pulseId ? 
Thanks

posts.author: janadel (Yiannis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
What is the difference between itemId and pulseId ?

Thanks

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: They are the same. Items were formerly referred to as pulses.
